_comment: Species: Celestial Guard Beast (仙卫兽) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Celestial Guard Beast

canonical.appearance: Constructed beast 3 m, body is refined celestial-material, eyes glow with celestial-light
canonical.size: 3 m adult, 2000 jin; ancient 8 m, 30000 jin
canonical.behavior: Constructed guardian beast; cultivates by absorbing celestial-essence; follows orders
canonical.relationships: Constructed by cultivators; Wang Lin refined Ta Shan as celestial guard
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: celestial_guard_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
